runTitle: Vercel production broad release-facing QA - v8.10.8 core routes, dashboard, AI
coveredSurfaces: landing feature card modal open and ESC close
/login auth options and guest PIN flow
guest PIN login to landing session
system start countdown and /system-boot to /dashboard redirect
/dashboard render with 15 server cards and resource overview
server detail modal open + 3-tab switch + ESC close
AI starter prompt and representative chat response
AI timing header X-AI-Latency-Ms=208 on production stream response
production console error 0 on tested product routes

expertAssessments.rationale: Production에서 AI sidebar, fullscreen workspace, representative streaming chat를 직접 검증해 현재 릴리즈 범위에 충분합니다.
Vercel health/version과 X-AI-Latency-Ms는 확인했지만 Cloud Run admin observability pack은 이번 broad 범위에서 의도적으로 제외했습니다.
인증·세션·스트리밍 경로는 정상이나 prompt/security regression pack은 이번 broad run 범위 밖입니다.
Production deployment 증거, health/version API, guest→dashboard boot flow까지 릴리즈 관점 핵심 경로가 정상입니다.
Playwright MCP로 landing, dashboard, AI core까지 실제 사용자 동선을 재현해 broad smoke를 수행했습니다.
Dashboard raw metrics와 AI 요약이 같은 slot 기준으로 일관되게 나타나 현재 broad 릴리즈 범위에서 데이터 품질 이상은 보이지 않았습니다.

usageChecks.summary: Local Vercel usage CLI could not fetch project usage (404 Costs not found); manual dashboard follow-up required.

notes: Latest production deployment dpl_Ef513T2wzSDxUrkhJm92DK7jszPv for commit ae1eed462 reached READY/PROMOTED before broad QA execution.
Guest PIN 4231 flow still works and leads to system start countdown then dashboard session.
Representative AI chat used the streaming route /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 with content-type text/event-stream and X-AI-Latency-Ms header.
404 route rendered correctly; product routes inspected in this run showed no browser console errors.
